title: JOREST 32 in 1 Small Precision Screwdriver Set, Mens Gifts, Portable Magnetic Tool Kit with Torx T5 T6 T8 T9, Y00, Star P5, Repair for MacBook, Laptop, PS4, PS5, iPhone, Ring Doorbell, Xbox, Glasses
features: 【Pocket-sized Portable】Aluminum alloy handle weighs only 67 grams, portable and lightweight, easy to put into your pocket to carry around, anytime and anywhere to deal with unexpected repair needs.
【High Quality S2 Steel】Screwdriver bits are made of high quality S2 steel, hardness up to 60HRC, black plating on the surface to resist rust.

【32-in-1 Precision Screwdriver Set】 Contains 32 S2 alloy steel precision bits (including Philips PH000 (+1.2) PH000 (+1.5) PH00 (+2.0) PH0 (+3.0); Flat head screwdriver -0.8 -1.2 -1.5 -2.5 -3.0; Torx T1 T2 T3 T4 T5; Torx security TR6 TR7 TR8 TR9 TR10 TR15; Triwing Y000 (Y0. 6) Y00 (Y1.5) Y0 (Y2.5) Y1 (Y3.0); Pentalobe P2(0.8) P5(1.2) P6( 1.5); Hex H1.5 H2.0 H2.5 H3.0; MID 2.5.), durable and wear-resistant, not easy to slip silk deformation, easy to deal with cell phones, Glasses, toys, laptops and other small electronic products fine disassembly.

【More Than Just a Tool】Non-slip + twill friction non-slip design handle and rotatable screw cap provide comfortable and efficient operation. The tail cap rotates more silky smooth and can be played with while working with decompression effect.

【Magnetic Storage】 With magnetic storage compartment design, it can easily attach and organize the screwdriver bits, and will not fall apart when inverted. The handle and housing are magnetized to prevent loss. The matching velvet pouch is easy to store and protect the screwdriver, convenient to carry on the go. Also comes with a double-ended pry bar for easier disassembly.
